query:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "count!"
           FROM onboarding_applications
           WHERE tenant_id = $1
             AND ($2::uuid IS NULL OR agent_id = $2)
             AND ($3::uuid IS NULL OR branch_id = $3)
             AND ($4::text IS NULL OR current_status = $4)
             AND (NOT $5::bool OR current_status <> 'draft')
